properties.name: Feature: Dice Pool (Keep/Drop)
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Ruleset-agnostic keep/drop dice pool notation: NdM(kh|kl|dh|dl)K(+/-F), e.g. 3d6kl1 (keep lowest 1 of 3), 4d6dl1 (drop lowest 1), 2d20kh1 (advantage-style). Adds a /pool slash command and a Keep High/Keep Low + amount field to Table records.
